added.description: LocalGrpcServer and LocalGrpcChannel for zero-config local IPC API
Threaded maxInboundMessageSize through the entire stack
Structured logging via logGrpcEvent for transport diagnostics
48 multi-process integration scenarios across TCP, UDS, named pipes and 129 http2 internal tests

changed.description: Vendored http2 by removing package:http2 dependency into lib/src/http2/
Rewrote server shutdownActiveConnections() with deterministic 5-phase lifecycle
Refactored named pipe transport to a two-isolate architecture with cooperative shutdown and write queue chunking

fixed.description: Fixed server shutdown races and lifecycle issues
Fixed client connection lifecycle by adding connectTransport() shutdown guard and dispatch loop re-queue fix
Preserved GrpcError status codes in handler error preservation (_onError)
Fixed isCanceled setter to respect the value parameter
Fixed vendored http2 Bug #1: ConnectionMessageQueueIn.onTerminated assert to defensive clear
Fixed vendored http2 Bug #2: _pingReceived/_frameReceived closed in _terminate()
Fixed vendored http2 Bug #3: BufferedBytesWriter._closed guard
